_publications._publicationTitle: The scaffold protein KSR1, a novel therapeutic target for the treatment of Merlin-deficient tumors.

_contextSnippet: The apoptotic activity was measured by a robust and quantitative Caspase-Glo® 3/7 Assay. The results of the apoptotic assay show that knockdown of KSR1 with shRNA-C can significantly increase apoptosis
details: Provided robust and quantitative measurement of apoptotic activity, showing that KSR1 knockdown significantly increased apoptosis in schwannoma cells
